extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won a technical barrier-narrowed finale in Bayonne after Alpecin-Deceuninck positioned him perfectly through the corner sprint.
tactical_patterns: Alpecin-Deceuninck's Mathieu van der Poel leadout delivered through corners where barriers funneled sprint, exploiting technical finish geometry.
LAFAY Victor abandoned early breakaway to contest intermediate sprint points, revealing willingness to sacrifice stage ambitions for green jersey accumulation.

rider_signals.PALZER Neilson: neutral: third consecutive breakaway suggests targeting KOM jersey through attrition rather than stage wins
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: top-10 finish on technical twisty finale shows improved handling at 38 years for history attempt
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: third place without visible leadout train indicates positioning independence compared to prior years
